title: Bug in "Audio Capture" function
author: TcDhlPro
body_snippet: Version: 1.77.2 / 1.78.2 NB 3405. Config > Redirect > Audio Capture. By default disabled. If enabled, works normally on first RDP connect. After closing and reopening mRemoteNG, Audio Capture disappears from Config > Redirect interface and becomes unusable. After second restart, it reappears but is disabled again. Setting oscillates between save/reload cycles.

iterations.description: Audio Capture setting lost/oscillating across save/reload cycles. Upstream fixed in PR #3195 (merged 2026-03-03). Issue closed as COMPLETED.

notes: Fixed upstream via PR #3195. Audio Capture RDP redirect setting was oscillating between save/reload. Check if our fork has the fix (upstream merge needed).
